headline: Cold War Drama 'Das Boot' Secures Full Series Stream at MHz Choice
lede: The classic WWII submarine series finds new digital harbor as MHz Choice acquires streaming rights to all four seasons of the critically acclaimed international drama.
body:
MHz Choice has torpedoed the U.S. streaming landscape by securing comprehensive rights to Wolfgang Petersen's legendary maritime war series *Das Boot*, bringing the complete four-season run to American viewers for the first time.

The critically acclaimed German production, which originally premiered in 1981 as a landmark film before evolving into a contemporary series, represents a significant acquisition for the niche international content streamer. Previously fragmented across platforms like Hulu, the series will now offer audiences a comprehensive viewing experience of its intense naval warfare narrative.

Kino Lorber's MHz Choice strategically positions itself as a destination for sophisticated international programming by securing this comprehensive package. The series, which tracks the harrowing experiences of German submariners during World War II, has maintained substantial critical respect for its nuanced portrayal of warfare's human dimensions.

Industry observers note that the acquisition signals MHz Choice's continued commitment to curating high-quality international content for discerning streaming audiences. The series' complex narrative and technical authenticity have consistently distinguished it from more conventional war dramas.
key_facts: Full four-season series acquired by MHz Choice
Based on classic Wolfgang Petersen film
